Parameter.name: CornerIdentifiers
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets comma separated corner identifiers.

Parameter.name: CtvPins
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets CTV capture pins.

Parameter.name: DtsConfiguration
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets DTS configuration name. Empty configuration name means DTS capture move is disabled.

Parameter.name: FailCaptureCount
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets FailCaptureCount. Default 1 will set stop-on-first-fail. Any value greater than 1 will run full plist unless used in combination with ReturnOn plist options.

Parameter.name: FlowIndex
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the current FlowIndex.

Parameter.name: FlowIndexCallbackName
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the current FlowIndexCallbackName.

Parameter.name: ForwardingMode
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets forwarding mode.

Parameter.name: InitialMaskBits
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets forwarding mode.

Parameter.name: LimitGuardband
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets LimitGuardband to be used with VminForwarding SearchGuardbandEnabled option.

Parameter.name: PinMap
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets recovery map name. User can enter Json stream or input file.

Parameter.name: PostInstancePlist
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets PostInstancePlist execution.

Parameter.name: PreloadParameters
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the configuration name for PreloadParameters. Parameters will be evaluated during CustomPreVerify.

Parameter.name: PrintPatternsOccurrences
Parameter.descriptions: Print failing patterns occurrences to ituff.

Parameter.name: RecoveryMode
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets DieRecovery update mode.

Parameter.name: RecoveryOptions
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets DieRecoveryOutgoing_ rule.

Parameter.name: RecoveryTimingsTc
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets a new timings for RecoveryTimingRetest.

Parameter.name: RecoveryTrackingIncoming
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets an recovery tracking name to be sourced.

Parameter.name: RecoveryTrackingOutgoing
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets recovery tracking name to be updated.

Parameter.name: ScoreboardPerPatternFails
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets scoreboard per pattern capture fails limit. Default is 1.

Parameter.name: StartVoltagesOffset
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets an offset to the calculated start voltage.

Parameter.name: TestMode
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets test mode.

Parameter.name: TriggerLevelsCondition
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets trigger levels test condition name.

Parameter.name: TriggerMap
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets trigger map.

Parameter.name: VminResult
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets vmin result. Stores value in SharedStorage using comma-separated key names with Context.DUT.

Parameter.name: VoltageConverter
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets a list of voltage overrides from VminForwarding.

Parameter.name: VoltagesOffset
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets an offset to applied voltage.

Parameter.name: ExecutionMaxFailMode
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the execution mode when the maximum number of failures is reached during plist execution.

ExitPort.PortDescriptions: Failed search and failed recovery rules.
Passed search but failed recovery rules.
Failed search and passed recovery rules.
PORT FAIL FOR SW ERROR CONDITION
PORT FAIL FOR HW ALARM CONDITION
